targets.query:
from(bucket: "demo_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "measured_metrics")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      ELcompute: ((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) * (if exists r["assumed_P_core_w"] then r["assumed_P_core_w"] else 25.0) / (3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ELmemory:  (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Mused"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Mused"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Mused"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Mused"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["assumed_P_mem_w"] then r["assumed_P_mem_w"] else 10.0) * ((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) / (1024.0 * 1000.0 * 3600.0),
      ELstorage: (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Sused"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Sused"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Sused"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Sused"] else 0.0) * (if exists r["assumed_P_storage_w"] then r["assumed_P_storage_w"] else 5.0) / (1073741824.0 * 1000.0 * 3600.0),
      Enetwork:  (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Dnetwork"] else 0.0) * 0.277778 / 1073741824.0,
      EDB:       ((if exists r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] else 0.0)) * 0.005 / (3600.0 * 1000.0),
      EAPI:      (if exists r["api_API_LAPI"] then r["api_API_LAPI"] else 0.0) * 15.0 / (3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ERekog:    (if exists r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] then r["rekognition_Rekognition_Tresponse"] else 0.0) * 0.0 / (3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ES3active: ((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] else 0.0)) * ((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] else 0.0)) * 0.005 / (3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ES3idle:   ((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_B"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_B"] else 0.0)) * 0.0001 / (1073741824.0 * 1024.0 * 1000.0),
      PUE:       (if exists r["assumed_PUE"] then r["assumed_PUE"] else 1.5),
      GEF:       (if exists r["grid_emission_factor"] then r["grid_emission_factor"] else 350.0)
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      ETotal: r.ELcompute + r.ELmemory + r.ELstorage + r.Enetwork + r.EDB + r.EAPI + r.ERekog + r.ES3active + r.ES3idle
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      SCI: r.ETotal * r.PUE * r.GEF
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "SCI"])

from(bucket: "demo_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "measured_metrics")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      ELambda:  ((if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Texec"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_DoorbellLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FaceRecognitionLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] then r["lambda_FetchWebsiteFromS3_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_PINVerificationLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] then r["lambda_UploadLambda_Tinit"] else 0.0)) * (if exists r["assumed_P_core_w"] then r["assumed_P_core_w"] else 25.0) / (3600.0 * 1000.0),
      EStorage: ((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Rtotal"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Rtotal"] else 0.0)) * ((if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-img_Dlatency"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] then r["s3_mhm-home-security-ui_Dlatency"] else 0.0)) * 0.005 / (3600.0 * 1000.0),
      EDB:      ((if exists r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Events_Lsuccess"] else 0.0) + (if exists r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] then r["dynamodb_Users_Lsuccess"] else 0.0)) * 0.005 / (3600.0 * 1000.0),
      EAPI:     (if exists r["api_API_LAPI"] then r["api_API_LAPI"] else 0.0) * 15.0 / (3600.0 * 1000.0),
      ERekog:   0.0
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "ELambda", "EStorage", "EDB", "EAPI", "ERekog"])
